response.justification: Strong engineer with 20 years of experience and proven Staff-level seniority, but the resume demonstrates no tangible experience with experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, or data-driven analysis—all foundational to this Principal role. The background is primarily full-stack web development and general infrastructure rather than growth/experimentation systems. Worth exploring further only if they've built relevant systems not explicitly mentioned.
strengths: 20+ years of progressive technical experience with multiple Staff-level roles showing architectural leadership and mentoring (organized code dojos, taught workshops on TDD and infrastructure)

Strong software engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and hands-on experience with high-scale distributed systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby, multi-region infrastructure)
Proficiency in all required programming languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript) with demonstrated ability to pick the right tool and write production code across diverse domains
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout automation—core responsibilities of this role
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure work, statistical analysis, or data-driven decision-making systems required for growth platform leadership
Career trajectory heavily weighted toward full-stack web development and general infrastructure rather than specialized growth or measurement systems expertise

key_factors.factor: Metrics, telemetry, and data analysis background
